attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT

WSOL.SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DATE,
WSOL.FACTORY_RECOMMIT_DATE,

WSOL.PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE,
WSOL.CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE,
WSOL.CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE,
WSOL.SO_LINE_OPTION_FLAG,
WSOL.AR_INTERFACE_RESULT_CODE,
WSOL.AR_INTERFACE_DATETIME,
WSOL.RU_SOL_RETURN_CONTEXT_CODE,
WSOL.RU_SOL_RETURN_REASON_CODE,
WSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
WSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
WSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
WSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
WSOL.BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME,
WSOL.SERVICE_CONTRACT_ROLE,
WSOL.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,
WSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,

WSOL.EDW_CREATE_USER,

WSOL.PRODUCT_KEY,
WSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
WSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,

WSOL.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WSOL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
WSOL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
WSOL.ADVANCED_SERVICES_PROJECT_CD,
WSOL.RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WSOL.LINE_STATUS_CD,
WSOL.COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CD,
WSOL.SOL_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
WSOL.SOL_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
WSOL.DV_SOL_CANCELLED_QTY ,
WSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG, /* Rel10 changes */
WSOL.DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
WSOL.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_REF_ID,
WSOL.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_WEB_ORDER_ID,

WSOL.RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
WSOL.RATE_TABLE_NAME,
WSOL.INCRMTL_MTHY_RCRR_REV_TRXL_AMT,
WSOL.NONRECURRING_REV_TRXL_AMT,
WSOL.ANNUAL_RCRR_REV_TRXL_AMT,
WSOL.ENDCST_ERP_CST_ACT_LOC_USE_KEY,

WSOL.DV_INCRMT_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT,

WSOL.DV_ANNUAL_RCRR_REV_USD_AMT,

WSOL.BUNDLE_SBSCRPTN_FLG,

FROM
$$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER_LINE WSOL
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1
	      FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT
	     WHERE NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
	     )
